# Contributing Guideline

## Repository Ownership

This repository is maintained solely by [@AndrasZiegler](https://github.com/AndrasZiegler).

**External contributions (pull requests) are not accepted.** The `master` branch is protected and all changes must be authored and approved by the repository owner.

## Reporting Issues

If you discover a bug, security vulnerability, or other issue:

**Do not open a public issue.** Please contact the maintainer privately first:

- **Email:** [andras.ziegler@silabs.com](mailto:andras.ziegler@silabs.com)
- **Subject:** `[devs-coding-convention-tool] Issue Report`

This allows issues to be investigated and fixed before public disclosure, protecting all repositories that depend on this tool.

Once the issue has been resolved, a public acknowledgment can be added if requested.

## Licensing

Please check the [LICENSE.md](../LICENSE.md) for licensing details.

## Code Standards

This tool enforces the Silicon Labs [coding guidelines](https://github.com/SiliconLabsSoftware/agreements-and-guidelines/blob/main/coding_standard.md).
